texto: I love costumes. I love getting dressed up because it really helps my imagination make the leap to believe that I am who I say I am.

frase_original: I love costumes. I love getting dressed up because it really helps my imagination make the leap to believe that I am who I say I am.

texto: A lot of the time with child actors, you get the feeling they're trying to have a kind of poise or presentation that's beyond their years that might be put on, but also might be because they've spent years just hanging out with adults and they don't even have a sense of what it's like to grow up with kids their own age.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alessandro Nivola: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “A lot of the time with child actors, you get the feeling they're trying to have a kind of poise o…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, time, child pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de child e grow.

frase_original: A lot of the time with child actors, you get the feeling they're trying to have a kind of poise or presentation that's beyond their years that might be put on, but also might be because they've spent years just hanging out with adults and they don't even have a sense of what it's like to grow up with kids their own age.
